author: Haroen Viaene
body:
*  fix(merge): change implementation  (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#716) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/736c8ae24d64c61020622a4628a0511d138c1873
 * chore: mention remaining changes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/1f7ea90d5c3196c0f1f6abfc62b7cde6ffd2bb4c
 * chore(deps): update circleci/node:8.15.1 docker digest to ef1a0c4 (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#715) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/4b2c788e191edb796fddf3cf6b76a2638c54f1e6

 * chore(lodash): remove lodash from dependency list (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#705) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/d1be2134284e26873ded070a898cf93537b828cb, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/552
 * chore(release): allow canary release (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#712) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/a72f0de92e7d6c31883f95710903a41266e9b3d6
 * chore(removeHierarchicalFacetRefinement): remove error if not refined (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#747) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/89dc193d91f38c4116515e82526c62858cd322e9
 * chore: merge develop into master (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#750) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/77e3e8459b26c606988fe0cc93c971b58d6d12b6

 * chore(ts): add methods https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/3c4ee8fb54053cbaff6e3f681a7ec213a833985a
 * chore(ts): add ruleContexts to SP https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/bdb516ebd943bc6751106d0eef53044ba9e85363
 * chore(ts): add searchOnlyWithDerivedHelpers (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#739) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/1f5dd4c890db6575564cd26e74d0a95d2ab97840
 * chore(ts): publish definition file too https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/4949596bc8bd60b89ca463345b77d0a668ff00ff
 * chore(TS): isNumericRefined has only one required argument https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/1d4e7fbadf2bbb942c10ecdf870fec69ddc43ff3
 * chore(warn): remove unused function (lodash.bind) (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#682) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/da805d9274ee9250886e9521692f14f3ed4cb16d
 * chore: update release command https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/3255f367ba1f42532a194ff95cfe15057a8595c9
 * docs: add link to wiki https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/f0915c391036ca88449d16d356c3ee6732308492
 * docs: update event signature (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#701) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/1a0c343dcaf02b2a5c258416bc5b6f8ef973cb78
 * docs(migration): mention changed methods (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#732) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/1c9bdcd64bd5dfa8841f70e3ea599164478df5be
 * docs(next): add migration guide https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/dfb08f05f530737f32b03ee9737e4ce3dad17230
 * docs(serverUsed): mention getRankingInfo (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#706) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/4a8d8f7012130aead69652e35c62f31b6e5d736f, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/500
 * feat: implement dedicated reset page method (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#673) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/8fa4ee4d4071fd665344dea88866f6cae1c1bd6e
 * feat(getState): remove filter option (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#707) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/681bf171abec65ac9bc35bfc4aa548230a5b39c7
 * feat(getState): remove getState (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#708) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/b951579ae9acb9df9866e7499035b20f8266d668
 * feat(requestBuilder): prevent needless extra requests for empty refinements (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#737) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/a03ff2935109a78495a91dbaf29b0edefd144945
 * feat(search): allow the search only with Derived Helpers (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#704) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/3da864c68bd5283280fd6934fb74115126dac195

 * feat(typescript): move typings inline (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#719) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/68af05ed12c8f6d7466d39c9d880656aea0d6382
 * fix(defaults): remove const https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/7df8754bcde5d587e68efc4479a167f33e4b068f
 * fix(errors): remove isRefined (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#731) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/1da00007f5b5c30d4216d6bd759ffe62621ca6b9
 * fix(getConjunctiveRefinements): no error when requested facet is not conjunctive (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#724) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/b7c9a3f80fe50445b7d6bce7213e5216b86aaf85
 * fix(getDisjunctiveRefinements): remove error (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#725) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/c573d334265a34e4faa7163da9b223d19857644f
 * fix(getExcludeRefinements): replace error by default value (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#726) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/77f6770dd145e09f6b4a8034a7e5f2a145bb8fd8
 * fix(getFacetStats): remove error (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#721) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/3b593d7704422c17963ab2cf427c6a7ec5a8ce12
 * fix(getFacetValues): don't throw error when there's no facet (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#720) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/cfdbc5b3a5f593e7b2f8d7d3c56e9f2ab327eb13
 * fix(getHierarchicalFacetBreadcrumb): don't throw an error (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#723) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/4a752446513519810bcaa55c1bbd813aa57a2cc2
 * fix(isDisjunctiveFacetRefined): return false if not in disjunctiveFacets (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#729) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/7cb124db479f0b0882fe0dd11b44d4f030cf0100
 * fix(isExcludeRefined): remove error in favor of false (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#728) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/238e975d0fca2b08205a4d4677dd88ad0f02628e
 * fix(isFacetRefined): return false if facet isn't declared (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#727) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/c2d8afea38414996c9ef134f7ce8129a29d447e6
 * fix(isHierarchicalFacetRefined): return false if refinement isn't a facet (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#730) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/0a913c79cc790126eff506c8b282f14a9dfb47e5
 * fix(lodash/intersection): replace with custom implementation (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#718) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/dd63327ec24ac4eed17a2bb29d5292eb03612ca4
 * fix(removeXFacet): make sure this fully removes empty arrays (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#743) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/33f256c319b593ed3785f5e2f8cf99a4816d6d57
 * fix(results): remove lodash looping over objects (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#648) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/f3287d8fe879d23e82ee2cca53fdb3f600fa44d5, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/258
 * fix(sortBy): compare whole prefix instead of first character (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#702) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/21fcd34577faa4681a433ff9a1f4d3ca5603b71b, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/702
 * fix(toggleRefinement): keep an empty array when clearing (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#738) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/9ab228d4bfe9764c4d9540404796549fa563e499
 * fix(types): add state.removeNumericRefinement (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#742) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/e8b4b349961785640ffc2b9cfe472b032eee9a1d
 * refactor(addAgent): remove duplicate code (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#657) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/050a17f78f4acfc7b3d20407f450618d8a9e3602
 * refactor(error): use object vs list of arguments (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#700) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/c70d6ee57654a5fc8d9f1f4814f3ff9121622409
 * refactor(lodash): compact (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#689) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/7a5af0e9b2380b2246484b3aa69402f1f480292b
 * refactor(lodash): forOwn (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#697) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/a0af7595abff3e1074813c1f83de3f37fff53765
 * refactor(lodash): intersection (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#696) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/0077f5081d7ac8d26d83c75a8be5519eb33da09a
 * refactor(lodash): map & trim (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#679) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/a8c5f2c1ca20c6fdf72cb1576ca013a7eb86d6e3
 * refactor(lodash): merge (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#694) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/7cb5357dbf42beca5f244c5ec657438d9c497805
 * refactor(lodash): partial & partialRight (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#693) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/151685d725a86b605a084d7973b6a87963b2d3ee
 * refactor(lodash): remove filter (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#685) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/16a3affe7097263708bd8403cfa61015296aa76a
 * refactor(lodash): remove flatten (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#695) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/d2b667f8e826125e30b3561f9d96598ed4801c99
 * refactor(lodash): remove forEach (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#674) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/58fd08f5c3cee1a1b20f1d8135d6d055e14c0205
 * refactor(lodash): remove reduce (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#678) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/187ae6701ccb45773596621a091d6df7c288660b
 * refactor(lodash): remove simple functions (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#656) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/ed2a393fb53d9266c4fb06b3ed7d3c6731bd0e5a
 * refactor(lodash): remove startsWith (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#690) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/75f1035957d43602e7825313621d7e16e798da23
 * refactor(lodash): replace defaults with pure alternative (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#692) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/c5b0c890f0b75897e279b5495938da9b5fd98fac
 * refactor(lodash): replace find & findIndex (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#687) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/c190cb39fdf8bd3cb50ade7f927b71644f6f819c
 * refactor(lodash): replace orderBy (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#698) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/7805cd816cfacd813f1147c5b52f3218cbc1b20f
 * refactor(lodash): sumBy (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#688) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/a037c6f3ef2f0964114a04ad451784e733454eb0
 * refactor(result): use object vs list of arguments (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#699) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/f4ea8054a06f2641b8dfb079adf5c5acb462b9f3
 * refactor(search): emit object (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#683) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/1029dcd29bfc83a284580e7252819f0d7cfd952a
 * refactor(searchForFacetValues): use object vs list of arguments (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#684) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/d2accedc5b249f9bf6118e9382b14fe4e819baec
 * refactor: remove getQueryParameter (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#713) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/6b8c6431873cb7b5785f4be34dcc15002ae2e128
 * refactor(searchOnce): use object vs list of arguments (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#681) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/a86581a9bc1dafa11511524bf7e390b7206dcab3
 * refactor(SearchParameters): removes default values (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#670) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/2679f998cb78b06e80044d22ee13954bd2dc1d7d
 * refactor(url): remove url helpers (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#652) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/b9e3fd99eda6b3a084b9e24cce84d7bef7a0cadc
 * test(sffv): no longer test impossible responses (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#686) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/09e475fe17eb623d47f8ee8c091d6afcf171489c

### BREAKING CHANGE

* getState(filters) is replaced my manually filtering the returned object
* removed helper.isRefined, use helper.hasRefinements instead
* SearchParameters.filter is removed

* doc(filter): remove reference
* use helper.state instead of helper.getState()
